title: adenia pumila
intro: Adenia pumila, also known as the dwarf thorny passion flower, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Adenia pumila include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which are derived from its sap and leaves. The health benefits of Adenia pumila include treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections, as well as reducing fever and relieving pain. Adenia pumila is often used in traditional herbal preparations, such as infusions, ointments, and poultices, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
